value.found_quote: Subagents are specialized AI assistants that handle specific types of tasks. Use one when a side task would flood your main conversation with search results, logs, or file contents you won't reference again: the subagent does that work in its own context and returns only the summary.
value.rationale: The page directly describes Subagents in Claude Code as specialized AI assistants that run in their own isolated context window, handle a delegated task, and return a summarized result to the main conversation, matching the claim. It also states "Each subagent runs in its own context window" and that Claude "delegates to that subagent, which works independently and returns results." Presented as a current feature.
